'''''Star Wars: The Adventures of Han Solo''''' is a Level 2 [[Dorling Kindersley|DK]] Readers book written by [[Lindsay Kent]] and published in [[2011]].

==Publisher's summary==
''The Adventures of Han Solo'' follows Han on his exciting journeys throughout the ''Star Wars'' galaxy! Beginning readers will see the amazing characters and places Han Solo encounters!''''

==Media==
===Editions===
*{{ISBN|978-0-7566-8252-1}}; [[Dorling Kindersley]], [[2011]], hardcover
*{{ISBN|978-0-7566-8251-4}}; Dorling Kindersley, 2011, paperback
